title: Condensed milk tart
excerpt: Ingredients 1 tin condensed milk 3 tins milk 5 ml butter 2 eggs 60 ml Maizena 40 ml custard powder 5 ml vanilla essence pinch of salt 1 pack Tennis biscuits Method Grease a glass dish and place whole Tennis biscuits in a single layer at the bottom of the dish as a crust. Cook the condensed milk and 2 and …
html:
Ingredients

  • 1 tin condensed milk
  • 3 tins milk
  • 5 ml butter
  • 2 eggs
  • 60 ml Maizena
  • 40 ml custard powder
  • 5 ml vanilla essence
  • pinch of salt
  • 1 pack Tennis biscuits

Method

Grease a glass dish and place whole Tennis biscuits in a single layer at the bottom of the dish as a crust.

Cook the condensed milk and 2 and a half tins of milk and butter in the microwave for 10 minutes.

Whisk the rest of the ingredients together and mix with the milk mixture.

Put it back in the microwave for another 5 minutes or until it thickens.

Pour the mixture over the tennis biscuits.

Put it in the fridge to set.

Variation: Instead of whole tennis biscuits, process the biscuits in a food processor until fine.

Add 60 ml melted butter and press the crumb mixture firmly into the bottom of the dish.

Place in the fridge for at least an hour to firm up before pouring in the filling.

Easy!
